name: IDV explanation for motor insurance
description: User doesn't understand IDV and how it affects their premium

input.message: When renewing my car insurance they asked me to select IDV. What is IDV and how do I choose the right value? My car is a 3-year-old Maruti Swift.

notes: IDV = current market value = ex-showroom price × depreciation factor. 3-year-old car: ~50% depreciation. Higher IDV = higher premium but better claim payout. Should recommend market IDV, not artificially low.
